---
name: Feature request
about: Describe what you want built
---

> [!TIP]
> This template has two layers: the human-readable sections above the divider describe *what* and *why*. The Implementation notes below the divider are for agents and implementers — fill them in during or after discovery.

**What**
[Describe the feature clearly]

**Why**
[The problem this solves or the value it adds]

**Acceptance criteria**
- [ ] [Criterion 1: what must be true when done]
- [ ] [Criterion 2]
- [ ] [Criterion 3]

**Scope notes**
[Anything explicitly out of scope, constraints, or design preferences]

**Dependencies**
[Issues that must be completed before this one can start — remove section if none]

- Blocked by: #[issue_number] — [reason]
- Blocks: #[issue_number] — [reason]
- Parallel with: #[issue_number] — [can be worked at the same time]

---

**Implementation notes**

> Fill in during or after discovery. This section is for agents and implementers.

- [Files to create or modify]
- [Conventions to follow]
- [Edge cases to handle]
- [Test plan]
